title: Quality Assurance Engineer I, ShipTech QA
job_function: Quality Assurance, Information Technology, and Engineering
description:
**Description**
 Are you passionate about quality and looking for an opportunity to solve \\& debug complex technical problems and test innovative solutions in a fast paced environment working with smart, passionate team members, this might be the role for you.
   

  

 We are looking for an experienced Quality Assurance Engineer to join our team and make a difference!
   

  

 Who are we?
   

  

 Amazon’s transportation systems get millions of packages to customers worldwide faster and cheaper, while providing world class customer experience – from checkout to shipment tracking to delivery. Amazon businesses continue to experience a rapid expansion into new markets and geographies. Our Transportation Technology division builds the complex software solutions that work across our shippers and carriers to optimize time, cost and accuracy of getting the packages delivered. We are at the heart of Amazon's worldwide operations. Providing visibility of package, containers and network to our consumers, at any point of time, in an accurate fashion, is a technically challenging domain that we deal with. ShipTech systems form the connective tissue between shipment and carriers enabling critical transportation functions for Amazon. It enables Shippers to ship and deliver shipments to customers by the promised date and manages shipment lifecycle.
   

  

 We are looking for quality assurances engineers with a penchant for solving complex problems \\& improve testing productivity using automation \\& tooling. You will have the opportunity to work with a wide variety of technologies from front\\-end UI to back\\-end distributed services. You will own the quality of major deliverables end\\-to\\-end, working closely with stakeholders to execute them. If you enjoy broadening your technical skills and working in an environment that thrives on creativity, experimentation, and innovation, then this is the job for you!
   

  

 Quality Assurance Engineer (QAE) test code at both the service and user level, using a variety of testing techniques, both manually and with automated tools. You will work to be able to understand software internals, debug complex problems, and write automated tests in and/or using existing automated tools. QAE work with Software Development Engineers, and Technical Program Managers to understand technical implementation of features. Looking for a strong QAE who enjoys being challenged and can work independently with multiple stakeholders such as product managers, TPMs, SDMs, SDEs, partner teams to setup quality best practices and write solid test strategies for long term success.
   

  

 These engineers will provide the technical leadership to the team, drive best practices, mentor other engineers and drive continuous improvements in engineering excellence.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Own writing and maintaining comprehensive test strategy/plans, test cases and execute the same to assure quality of ShipTech software releases
* Work closely with SDEs, Product Managers, TPMs, QAEs, SDETs, and other stakeholders to ensure a seamless integration of quality throughout the development lifecycle.
* Experience programming with at least one modern language such as Java, C\\+\\+, or C\\# including object\\-oriented design to design and debug/maintain test automation scripts.
* Create, maintain, and execute test cases, test scripts, and test scenarios for various software components, including functional, regression, performance, and security testing
* Perform initial defect triage and root cause analysis, correctly log defects and collaborate with cross\\-functional teams so they can address issues.
* Strong oral and written communication skills, as well as the ability to think clearly and analytically, problem solving, scope business requirements, and prioritize work on projects.
* Actively participate in retrospectives and contribute to process improvements to enhance overall product quality.
* Stay up\\-to\\-date with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices in QA and testing, and apply this knowledge to continuously improve testing processes.
* Enhance key metrics for measuring and reporting on the quality of software products and test effectiveness.


**About The Team**
 Our ShipTech QA team plays central role in quality efforts for top strategic initiatives within the ShipTech org. Our vision is to reliably measure \\& assure quality of software releases at high velocity with focus on improving customer satisfaction, move quality upstream, provide reviews \\& audits through consultation and improve testing productivity using automation \\& tooling.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 2\\+ years of quality assurance engineering experience
* Experience in automation testing
* Experience in manual testing
* Experience in UI and API automation testing (Selenium/SOAPUI)


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in API \\& Mobile testing
* Experience designing and planning test conditions, test scripts, and test data sets to ensure appropriate and adequate coverage and control

In this role, you will have the opportunity to learn a wide range of core Ethernet Technologies with architectural exposure to craft and develop Ethernet Switching as applied to both Public and Private cloud infrastructure. In addition, you will have the opportunity to participate in multi\\-functional collaboration and be exposed to all facets of the software development cycle from innovation, marketing requirement to product delivery.
   

  

**Your Impact**

Data Center team develops a 400G, 800G Ethernet switches, low latency switches and many features associated with it.

* Development experience on PCH and peripherals PCI, I2C, SPI, Higig\\+ bus, FPGA and CPLD handling, handling os special devices and peripherals – I2C\\-GPIO expanders. Exposure to standards – XAUI, SGMI, Serdes, SGMII, MSA
* Knowledge of asic bring up, low\\-level debugging, Linux drivers and 3rdparty ASICs/network processors highly desired.
* Excellent debugging skills and rich experience using various hardware, memory debugging tools


**Preferred Qualifications (Provide up to five (5\\) bullet points:** 
 these can include soft skills)
   

  

* Experience working on Scalable, Distributed Architectures a plus
* Strong written \\& verbal communication skills

* Ability to multi\\-task and solve complex problems
* Consistent track record of learning new technologies and features on own initiative
* A demonstrable passion for technology and software development


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

description:
**Job Description**
****Strategic Imperative:****
 The
 **Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET)** 
 plays a critical role in ensuring our products meet the highest standards of quality, reliability, and performance. By building robust automated test frameworks and integrating quality practices throughout the development lifecycle, this role accelerates product delivery, reduces defects, and enables the engineering team to deliver scalable, customer\\-focused solutions.
   

  

**Prodege**
 A cutting\\-edge marketing and consumer insights platform, Prodege has charted a course of innovation in the evolving technology landscape by helping leading brands, marketers, and agencies uncover the answers to their business questions, acquire new customers, increase revenue, and drive brand loyalty \\& product adoption. Bolstered by a major investment by Great Hill Partners in Q4 2021 and strategic acquisitions of Pollfish, BitBurst \\& AdGate Media in 2022, Prodege looks forward to more growth and innovation to empower our partners to gather meaningful, rich insights and better market to their target audiences.
   

  

 As an organization, we go the extra mile to “Create Rewarding Moments” every day for our partners, consumers, and team. Come join us today!
   

  

**Primary Objectives**
* Design, develop, and maintain automated tests for web applications and services that expose http or RPC API endpoints
* Partner closely with engineers and product teams to embed quality into every phase of the SDLC.
* Drive continuous integration and deployment testing to streamline release cycles.
* Identify and resolve performance, scalability, and reliability issues through automated validation.
* Provide mentorship and support to developers and QA team members on automation best practices.
* Ensure compliance with security, privacy, and industry quality standards.
* Develop strong domain knowledge, and regularly access/communicate value and risk with test cases.


****Qualifications** 
 \\-
 *T***
*o perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each job duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed below are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.*
**Detailed Job Duties**
* Develop, maintain, and enhance automated test suites to improve testing efficiency and coverage.
* Collaborate with product managers and engineers to define acceptance criteria and test strategies for new features.
* Build and maintain tools for performance testing, security testing, and integration validation.
* Participate in code reviews, providing feedback on testability and quality.
* Analyze test results, identify root causes of defects, and provide actionable recommendations.
* Support the team during production releases with regression testing and validation.
* Acquire and apply knowledge of the business domain to assess risk levels and prioritize test cases accordingly.
* Continuously monitor and improve automation processes for scalability and reliability.


****What does SUCCESS look like?****
 In this role, success will mean driving measurable improvements in software quality and delivery speed. Within the first year, the SDET will have achieved automation coverage of 90% or higher for critical features and regression testing, helping to significantly reduce release cycle times through well\\-integrated, automated pipelines. They will establish a scalable and maintainable automation framework adopted across teams, leading to early defect detection and prevention, and a marked decrease in production issues. By fostering strong collaboration with engineering, product, and QA teams, the SDET will integrate quality practices seamlessly into the development process, ensuring a culture of continuous improvement and excellence.
   

  

**The MUST Haves**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent in Computer Science, or Engineering; or equivalent years of relevant work experience.
* Three plus (3\\+) years of experience in software quality engineering, with a focus on test automation.
* Strong proficiency in one or more programming languages: Python, Java, C\\#, or JavaScript.
* Hands\\-on experience with automation frameworks/tools such as Selenium, Cypress, or Playwright.
* Demonstrated knowledge of API testing, using tools such as Postman or REST Assured.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab, GitHub Actions).
* Deep understanding of QA methodologies, testing principles, and SDLC best practices.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.


**The Nice To Haves**
* Experience with performance testing tools like JMeter or Gatling.
* Exposure to cloud\\-based environments (AWS, Azure, GCP).
* Familiarity with containerization and orchestration technologies like Docker and Kubernetes.
* Knowledge of security testing practices and tools.
* ISTQB certification or similar QA\\-related credentials.
* Experience with behavior\\-driven development (BDD) using Cucumber or similar tools.

description:
Comcast brings together the best in media and technology. We drive innovation to create the world's best entertainment and online experiences. As a Fortune 50 leader, we set the pace in a variety of innovative and fascinating businesses and create career opportunities across a wide range of locations and disciplines. We are at the forefront of change and move at an amazing pace, thanks to our remarkable people, who bring cutting\\-edge products and services to life for millions of customers every day. If you share in our passion for teamwork, our vision to revolutionize industries and our goal to lead the future in media and technology, we want you to fast\\-forward your career at Comcast.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 Responsible for translating code into user\\-friendly applications. Collaborates with internal teams to develop functional mobile applications while working in a fast\\-paced environment. Develops application programming interfaces (APIs) to support mobile functionality while keeping up to date with terminology, concepts and best practices for coding mobile apps. Has in\\-depth experience, knowledge and skills in own discipline. Usually determines own work priorities. Acts as resource for colleagues with less experience.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Job Description: Senior Android Developer**
**Location: Chennai**
**Duration: Full Time**
**Experiences: 5 years to 7\\.5 years**
**Candidate should be willing to join in 60 days**
**Skills \\& Experience**
**Core Android Expertise**
* 5\\+ years of experience developing native Android applications in production environments.
* Strong proficiency in Kotlin, including Coroutines and modern Android development patterns.
* Experience with Jetpack Compose in production applications.
* Solid understanding of Android fundamentals: Activities, Services, Intents, BroadcastReceivers, ContentProviders, and UI components.
* Experience with MVVM or similar architectural patterns.


**Concurrency, Performance \\& Tooling**
* Strong understanding of multi\\-threading and concurrency, including Coroutines and structured concurrency.
* Hands\\-on experience with performance profiling tools (Android Profiler, LeakCanary).
* Experience debugging and troubleshooting using ADB and Android Studio.
* Familiarity with network debugging tools such as Charles Proxy or Android Network Profiler.


**Media \\& Networking**
* Working knowledge of DASH/HLS streaming protocols.
* Experience integrating REST APIs, handling JSON payloads, and understanding REST concepts.
* Experience with GraphQL is a plus.


**AI \\& Automation**
* Proficient in integrating AI\\-assisted development workflows into mobile engineering processes, including code generation, refactoring, test creation, and documentation using tools such as GitHub Copilot, M365 Copilot, or equivalent.
* Experience leveraging LLM‑driven API design tools (e.g., OpenSpec) to define interfaces, generate stubs, validate schema consistency, and automate downstream client/server code generation.
* Ability to evaluate and apply AI\\-based tools for improving developer productivity, including static analysis, UI generation, performance tuning, and test coverage expansion.
* Familiarity with model\\-driven development workflows, using AI to translate product requirements into engineering artifacts (design docs, acceptance tests, mobile UI flows).
* Comfort operating in an AI\\-augmented development environment, including prompt engineering, validation of AI\\-generated output, and enforcing quality gates to ensure correctness and maintainability.
* Demonstrated ability to integrate mobile apps with AI\\-backed services, such as on\\-device ML frameworks, cloud inference APIs, semantic search, or conversational interfaces.


**Engineering Practices \\& DevOps**
* Strong command of Git, including collaborative workflows, branching strategies, and pull requests.
* Experience writing unit and UI tests (JUnit, Espresso, Mockito, Robolectric).
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, build automation, and release processes.
* Exposure to DevOps/SRE practices such as monitoring, incident response, and performance observability is a plus.


**Collaboration \\& Communication**
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, able to convey complex technical topics clearly.
* Proven experience working cross\\-functionally with Product, UX, QA, and platform teams.
* Comfortable operating in multi\\-team, multi\\-vendor environments with evolving requirements.


**Preferred / Nice To Have**
* Experience building consumer\\-facing apps at scale (sports, media, streaming, ticketing, or live events).
* Familiarity with Jetpack libraries, dependency injection frameworks (e.g., Dagger/Hilt).
* Experience with device capabilities such as location, Bluetooth, or notifications.
* Passion for innovation, continuous learning, and contributing to a strong engineering culture.


 Core Responsibilities
   

  

 Plan and design mobile software including writing, analyzing, and testing
   

  

 Android/IOS software code.
   

  

 Deliver documentation on the software development and implementation process.
   

  

 Design new software, supports applications under development, designs the prototype application and customizes current applications.
   

  

 Assist with the software update process for existing applications, and roll\\-outs of software releases.
   

  

 Build native mobile applications with an understanding of accessibility, localization, and offline needs.
   

  

 Create, maintain, and implement the source code that makes up the application or program.
   

  

 Develop and conduct routine maintenance on code to validate front\\-end, middleware, and database systems.
   

  

 Communicate with others to repair broken automation scripts and ensure delivery of quality solutions.
   

  

 Conduct testing, releasing and support of the application.
   

  

 Research and analyze technical references to obtain knowledge and gain exposure on the latest developments in technology.
   

  

 Research, write, and edit documentation and technical requirements, including software design evaluation plans, test results, and technical documentation.
   

  

 Work with the Quality Assurance team to determine if applications fit specification and technical requirements .
   

  

 Consistent exercise of independent judgment and discretion in matters of significance.
   

  

 Regular, consistent and punctual attendance. Must be able to work nights and weekends, variable schedule(s) as necessary.
   

  

**Other Duties And Responsibilities As Assigned.**
 Employees at all levels are expected to:
   

  

 Understand our Operating Principles; make them the guidelines for how you do your job.
   

  

 Own the customer experience \\- think and act in ways that put our customers first, give them seamless digital options at every touchpoint, and make them promoters of our products and services.
   

  

 Know your stuff \\- be enthusiastic learners, users and advocates of our game\\-changing technology, products and services, especially our digital tools and experiences.
   

  

 Win as a team \\- make big things happen by working together and being open to new ideas.
   

  

 Be an active part of the Net Promoter System \\- a way of working that brings more employee and customer feedback into the company \\- by joining huddles, making call backs and helping us elevate opportunities to do better for our customers.
   

  

 Drive results and growth.
   

  

 Support a culture of inclusion in how you work and lead.
   

  

 Do what's right for each other, our customers, investors and our communities.
